core_mechanism: zeta-function (analytic-continuation) regularization of a divergent sum over the discrete eigenvalue spectrum of a linear wave/differential operator on a bounded domain, extracting a finite renormalized quantity from an otherwise divergent spectral sum
brief_reason: The method obtains an exact discrete spectrum by solving an eigenvalue (Klein-Gordon) problem on a finite interval and then evaluates the vacuum energy by summing the mode energies via generalized zeta-function regularization plus renormalization, which is the machinery carrying the whole result.
